title: [applyDiff_Into_limits] OnAnotherWorld [diff_P3]
description:
[ AFTER Derivatives ]
watch the P.1 & P.2 Playlists before this one

[But start Integrals P.1 Simultanously]

Note:- It's Not 'really necessary' to watch the last 5 videos in the playlist but they can be fun, (only if you are not in a rush :wink:)

Note2:- & You are highly encouraged to Do all of your book limit stuff, when you are watching the last video. okay?

0. INSPIRATION:- 'There's a Whole Lot more to Discover about limits.... that the small amount that we do know e.g. Trynna apply First Principles on weird stuffs :shrugg'

This is Sequential
1. Limits
2. Hyperbola
3. Asymptotes [Intro]
4. Rational Functions [polynomial]
5. Approaching Asymptotes
6. Graphing Rationals
6.1 SIA or SFAIR
7. Extremities a.k.a Infinity
8. Approaching Infinity
9. Limits + Approaching
10. Vertical Asymptotes
11. Horizontal Asymptotes
12. Oblique Asymptotes
13. Long Division [Polynomials]
14. Continuity
15. Limits & Calculus

16. Differentiability
17. Piecemeal Function
18. Convergence of sin(x)
19. Proving Derivative of Trig Functions
20. You should go in Backwards for proving this one. First see proof, then come to convergence

21. Bernoulli's Rule (Bought by L'Hopital)
22. Logarithm Tricks
23. Where not apply Bernoulli's (L'Hopitals)
24. First Principles
25. knowing Bernoulli's makes you feel like not weak or cornered down
